name: bananas31-operator-cockpit
description: Clean-room rebuild of the BANANAS31 operator cockpit.

scripts.test:api: cd services/api && UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.cache/uv uv run pytest
scripts.seed:demo-db: cd services/api && UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.cache/uv uv run python scripts/seed_demo_db.py
scripts.serve:api: cd services/api && UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.cache/uv uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8010
